/usr/bin/aarch64-linux-gnu-g++ --sysroot=/mnt  -std=c++11 -fPIC -Wall -pthread CMakeFiles/test-http_server.dir/test-http_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test-http_server.dir/opt/EASY-EAI-Toolkit/EASY-EAI-Toolkit-3562/easyeai-api/netProtocol/http/https_request.cpp.o -o test-http_server  /mnt/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so -lstdc++
